objectives.text: Mayor! Fifty citizens! Can you hear the bustle? The streets are alive with people going about their work, children playing, and merchants trading. We have officially grown from an outpost into a proper hamlet!

options.answer: It is hard to believe how far we have come!

result.text: Travelers from distant lands are starting to take notice. They speak of a thriving hamlet led by a wise mayor. The citizens are bursting with pride! Here, they wanted you to have this!

options.answer: Fifty down, many more to come!

result.text: That ambition is exactly why people flock to live here! The citizens gathered these emeralds for you. A small token for everything you have done!

objectives.text: A hamlet of fifty is something to be proud of, but I know you will not stop here. The world awaits, Mayor!
